introParagraph1: cyYou can use this section to explain any exceptional hardship the defendant may experience if they were asked to leave their home.
introParagraph3: cyAny details the defendant provides will be considered by a judge when making their decision, but it is up to them to decide if exceptional hardship applies.
forExample: cyFor example, the defendant might have:
bullet1: cygone through a divorce or separation
bullet2: cylost their job or been made redundant
bullet3: cyexperienced a bereavement or long-term illness
question: cyWould the defendant experience exceptional hardship if they were asked to leave their home?
textAreaLabel: cyGive details about the exceptional hardship the defendant would experience

errors.exceptionalHardship: cySelect if the defendant would experience exceptional hardship if they were asked to leave their home
errors.exceptionalHardshipDetails: cyGive details about the exceptional hardship the defendant would experience
errors.exceptionalHardshipDetailsInvalidCharact: cyThe details of the exceptional hardship the defendant would experience must only include letters a to z, and special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
